narrative: Iran tensions and Hormuz attacks introduce a geopolitical risk premium as WTI surges — USD/JPY holds 157.26 with 300bp Fed-BoJ carry anchoring the bid; gold higher +0.28% near $4,546; equities -0.41%; DXY +0.18%; VIX 18.3.
